Race #3 of 7 in the 2012 Custom Windows Plus Badger Mod Tour presented by Gandrud Chevrolet Season

Badger Mod Tour:2012-03
Held on July 20, 2012 at Dodge County Fairgrounds Speedway in Beaver Dam, WI
25 L, 12.5 M, 20.125 KM - Scheduled Distance
